author: decentralizedlaw
content:
Standardization and facilitation is still often provided by centralized parties which is what attracts regulators. 

Please do! I sure could use some good practical suggestions... I am in touch with DAO platforms thinking about ideas to increase use-cases...

author: cryptowolf0346
content:
yeah, that’s a real issue

better onboarding for DAOs would help a lot-clearer contribution paths, reputation systems, defined roles, so coordination doesn’t always depend on a core group

most DAOs struggle more with execution than governance
